purpose: Monitoring companion app for DENG Tool: Rejoin
changelog: Dashboard headline cards now show PACKAGE stats (TOTAL / ONLINE / DEAD) across configured Roblox packages — not device count. Example: 1 cloud phone with 8 dead packages shows TOTAL 8 / ONLINE 0 / DEAD 8.
Snapshot: full screencap provider ladder with auto root escalation, richer bridge diagnostics, and deng-rejoin monitor snapshot-test [--upload-probe] for live capture proof.
Fish It Daily: one card per fish species caught in the selected period (image + name + rarity + count). Best Catch removed.
Fish It Stats: Secret/Forgotten cards use real fish images from the bot DB/leaderboard resolver; rod cards use real Ghostfinn/Element/Diamond images from channel 1483265484215287909.
Fish It Fish tab: fixed API model mismatch and clearer auth errors (Sign in with Discord) instead of generic cannot-reach-backend.
Light/Dark theme and Hide Username unchanged.
